description.value: Price 17,650 gp; Slot armor; CL 10th; Weight 45 lbs.; Aura moderate illusion and transmutation DESCRIPTION This +2 spiked splint mail is fashioned from hacked-off chunks of tanned hide and held together by humanoid spines. Used by orcs, these sets of armor are seen as a status symbol, and are adorned with trophies from slain foes, such as wayfinders. This armor grants its wearer the constrict ability, dealing an amount of damage equal to 1d6 + the wearer’s Strength modifier. The vertebrae of the spines adorning the backbreaker mail are sharpened, acting as +1 human bane armor spikes. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 9,025 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells beast shape I, disguise self, summon monster I
